ticket.subject: Cannot log in via SSO
ticket.description: Cannot log in via SSO since the IdP migration last weekend

ticket.subject: Password reset email never arrives
ticket.description: Password reset email never arrives even after multiple attempts

ticket.subject: Two-factor codes rejected
ticket.description: Two-factor codes from my authenticator app are rejected as invalid

ticket.subject: Dashboard error after update
ticket.description: Dashboard shows a generic error message after the last release

ticket.subject: API timeouts under load
ticket.description: API times out under modest concurrent load — calls fail with 504

ticket.subject: App crashes on photo upload
ticket.description: The mobile app crashes when uploading a photo larger than five megabytes

ticket.subject: Webhook delivery failing
ticket.description: Our webhook endpoint stopped receiving events after the recent maintenance

ticket.subject: Refund for cancellation
ticket.description: Please refund the prorated amount for the cancellation processed yesterday

ticket.subject: Wrong invoice currency
ticket.description: Invoice for our team plan is in USD but our billing currency should be EUR

ticket.subject: Charged after cancellation
ticket.description: Charged after I cancelled the subscription a week ago — please refund

ticket.subject: Wrong tax on invoice
ticket.description: Wrong tax rate appears on the invoice for our subsidiary in Spain

ticket.subject: Would like CSV export
ticket.description: I would like CSV export to include the assigned agent and the resolution time

ticket.subject: Add Slack notifications
ticket.description: Please add Slack notifications for new tickets in the high priority queue

ticket.subject: Bulk action support
ticket.description: Could you add bulk action support so we can close many tickets at once

ticket.subject: SAML SSO integration
ticket.description: We would like SAML SSO integration for the enterprise tier as a requirement

ticket.subject: Bug in date filter
ticket.description: Steps to reproduce filter by date pick yesterday observe wrong tickets returned

ticket.subject: Reproducible 500 on export
ticket.description: Steps to reproduce go to export click CSV with 1000 rows watch error 500

ticket.subject: Search returns wrong results
ticket.description: Steps to reproduce search for ticket id observe unrelated tickets in the result list

ticket.subject: Tablet layout broken
ticket.description: Steps to reproduce open the app on a tablet rotate to landscape see broken layout

ticket.subject: Pagination off by one
ticket.description: Steps to reproduce open ticket list and notice the pagination is off by one

ticket.subject: How to invite teammates
ticket.description: How do I invite teammates to my workspace and set their role

ticket.subject: Pricing for the Enterprise plan
ticket.description: What is the pricing for the Enterprise plan with 250 seats and SSO

ticket.subject: Documentation question
ticket.description: Where can I find the API documentation for the new v3 endpoints in beta

ticket.subject: Account activation email
ticket.description: My new account activation email never arrived after I signed up yesterday

ticket.subject: Charge dispute
ticket.description: I would like to dispute the charge from last week which I did not authorize

ticket.subject: Slow rendering on Safari
ticket.description: Page rendering is slow on Safari but works fine on Chrome and Firefox

ticket.subject: Add export to PDF
ticket.description: Please add export to PDF for invoices so I can attach them to expense reports

ticket.subject: Cannot access the API
ticket.description: Cannot access the API since this morning even with a fresh token from settings

ticket.subject: Notifications never delivered
ticket.description: Notifications never delivered to my email since I changed the address last week

ticket.subject: Custom branding for portal
ticket.description: Please add support for custom branding colors and logo on the customer portal
